register.title: Register for {eventName}
register.subtitle: Fill in your details — you'll get a QR code by email.
register.registrationClosed: Registration is closed for this event.
register.success_subtitle: Show this QR code at the entrance.
register.success_email_note: We sent your QR code to your email. Show it at the entrance — staff will scan it.
register.success_check_spam: Didn't receive it? Check spam, or contact the event organizer.
